user.title: Connect to StorageHub
user.description: Enter your StorageHub server details. You can create an API key in the StorageHub web UI under Settings > API Keys.

data_description.host: Full URL to your StorageHub instance (e.g., http://storagehub.local)
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll for updates (60-3600 seconds)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to StorageHub. Verify the URL is correct and the server is running.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Verify the key is correct and has the required scopes (read, search).

abort.already_configured: This StorageHub instance is already configured.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll for updates (60-3600 seconds)

no_config_entry.message: No StorageHub integration configured. Please add it via Settings > Devices & Services.

auth_failed.message: Authentication failed. Check your API key.

container_not_found.message: Container with QR code '{qr_code}' not found.
